  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor controller or motor location as required by code."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the disconnect switch to a location within sight of the motor and driven machinery, or install a lockable disconnect in compliance with NEC exceptions."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430.102 requires a disconnecting means to be located in sight from the controller location and the motor location. Since the disconnect is not within sight, it fails inspection due to safety hazards during maintenance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 430.102"
  ]
}
